title: Dutch Roast Chicken
description: A hearty Dutch-inspired roast chicken dish with a rustic twist.
instructions: 2. Rinse the chicken and pat it dry with paper towels.
3. In a small bowl, mix together the olive oil, mustard, salt, and black pepper.
4. Rub the mixture all over the chicken, making sure to get some under the skin as well.
5. Place the chopped onion and minced garlic inside the cavity of the chicken.
6. Truss the chicken with kitchen twine and place it in a roasting pan.
7. Roast the chicken in the preheated oven for about 45-50 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
8. Remove the chicken from the oven and let it rest for 10-15 minutes before carving and serving.
